summary: Product detail modal feature testing completed successfully. All core functionality working: product cards clickable, modal displays product image/name/specs/price, technical parameters fetched from API, close buttons work, CTA scrolls to contact section, works across different categories and on mobile.
passed_tests: Product card l1 (Kern AET) clickable - opens modal
Modal displays price (158.600 Kč bez DPH)
Modal fetches technical parameters from /api/products/l1/details - 8 rows displayed
X button close works - modal closes
Product card l2 (ABS-ABJ) clickable - opens modal with different content
Product card l3 (ALD) clickable - CTA button scrolls to contact section
Different category product (ob1 - ACLAS PS1-15B) - modal opens correctly
Product without price (s1 - Ocelová konstrukce) - price section hidden, custom CTA text 'Nezávazná poptávka'
Badge display in modal (l4 - Ověřeno badge)
Mobile responsive - modal opens and displays correctly on 390x844 viewport
API endpoint GET /api/products/{product_id}/details returns correct data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Product detail modal feature fully implemented and tested. Modal opens on product card click, displays image/name/specs/price/technical parameters from API, has working close buttons (X and Zavřít), CTA button scrolls to contact section. Works on desktop and mobile. 49 products in database across 12 categories.
